keyboard_typer.description: Automates pressing D-pad buttons to type a string on the Gen 1 onscreen keyboard. Assumes the cursor starts at 'A' (top-left).

move_sequence.description: Executes a sequence of button presses provided as a compact string (e.g. 'DDDRRU' for Down, Down, Down, Right, Right, Up). 'A', 'B', 'S' (Start), 'E' (Select) are also supported.

sequence.description: String of characters representing buttons: U, D, L, R, A, B, S, E

move_sequence.python_script:
import json
seq = input_data.get('sequence', '')
m = {'U': 'Up', 'D': 'Down', 'L': 'Left', 'R': 'Right', 'A': 'A', 'B': 'B', 'S': 'Start', 'E': 'Select'}
res = [m[c] for c in seq.upper() if c in m]
print(json.dumps(res))

history.commit_message: Fixed script to print a JSON array instead of returning a python list.

shop_buyer.description: Calculates and executes the optimal sequence of Up/Down button presses to buy a target quantity of items in Gen 1 shops, finishing with 'A'. Assumes starting at quantity 1.

pace_grass.description: Generates a sequence of Left/Right or Up/Down movements for pacing in tall grass to trigger encounters efficiently.

spam_button.description: Spams a specified button a set number of times. Extremely useful for getting through repetitive text or spamming the same attack in simple battles.

type_matchup.description: Calculates Gen 1 specific type matchup multipliers (including quirks like Ghost dealing 0x to Psychic).
type_matchup.python_script:
matchups = {
    'NORMAL': {'ROCK': 0.5, 'GHOST': 0},
    'FIGHTING': {'NORMAL': 2, 'FLYING': 0.5, 'POISON': 0.5, 'ROCK': 2, 'BUG': 0.5, 'GHOST': 0, 'PSYCHIC': 0.5, 'ICE': 2},
    'FLYING': {'FIGHTING': 2, 'ROCK': 0.5, 'BUG': 2, 'GRASS': 2, 'ELECTRIC': 0.5},
    'POISON': {'POISON': 0.5, 'GROUND': 0.5, 'ROCK': 0.5, 'BUG': 2, 'GHOST': 0.5, 'GRASS': 2},
    'GROUND': {'FLYING': 0, 'POISON': 2, 'ROCK': 2, 'BUG': 0.5, 'FIRE': 2, 'GRASS': 0.5, 'ELECTRIC': 2},
    'ROCK': {'FIGHTING': 0.5, 'FLYING': 2, 'GROUND': 0.5, 'BUG': 2, 'FIRE': 2, 'ICE': 2},
    'BUG': {'FIGHTING': 0.5, 'FLYING': 0.5, 'POISON': 2, 'GHOST': 0.5, 'FIRE': 0.5, 'GRASS': 2, 'PSYCHIC': 2},
    'GHOST': {'NORMAL': 0, 'PSYCHIC': 0, 'GHOST': 2},
    'FIRE': {'ROCK': 0.5, 'BUG': 2, 'WATER': 0.5, 'GRASS': 2, 'ICE': 2, 'DRAGON': 0.5},
    'WATER': {'GROUND': 2, 'ROCK': 2, 'FIRE': 2, 'WATER': 0.5, 'GRASS': 0.5, 'DRAGON': 0.5},
    'GRASS': {'FLYING': 0.5, 'POISON': 0.5, 'GROUND': 2, 'ROCK': 2, 'BUG': 0.5, 'FIRE': 0.5, 'WATER': 2, 'GRASS': 0.5, 'DRAGON': 0.5},
    'ELECTRIC': {'FLYING': 2, 'GROUND': 0, 'WATER': 2, 'GRASS': 0.5, 'ELECTRIC': 0.5, 'DRAGON': 0.5},
    'PSYCHIC': {'FIGHTING': 2, 'POISON': 2, 'PSYCHIC': 0.5},
    'ICE': {'FLYING': 2, 'GROUND': 2, 'WATER': 0.5, 'GRASS': 2, 'ICE': 0.5, 'DRAGON': 2},
    'DRAGON': {'DRAGON': 2}
}
atk = input_data.get('atk_type', '').upper()
def_type = input_data.get('def_type', '').upper()
mult = matchups.get(atk, {}).get(def_type, 1.0)
print(f"Gen 1 Matchup: {atk} vs {def_type} = {mult}x damage.")
